narrative:
Jerusalem Township has 2,095 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.8%, a clear Democratic lean of 10.0 percentage points.
